## Analog Devices lags sector peers on Wednesday despite posting a daily gain

No actionable read; routine relative underperformance note without a named catalyst.

- ADI shares rose on the day but underperformed comparable companies on a relative basis.
- Routine daily price-comparison note; no fundamental, product, or guidance news cited.
